rulings.Case Title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. ROSA SOTO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Void Default And Default Judgment; Memorandum; Declaration Of Evangelina Soto; Declaration Of Vicente Soto; Declaration Of David Soto; Appendix Of Non-California Authorities; And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 22, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANT EVANGELINA SOTO, DAVID SOTO, VICENTE SOTO's Motion To Set Aside Void Default And Default Judgment DENIED. The judgment is not void for lack of jurisdiction or due process. Defendants were served in accordance with CCP 415.45 by a registered process server. Defendants fail to rebut the presumption. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIN PING CHEN MAK VS. JUAN CARLOS RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 22, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT JUAN RAMIREZ, REBECCA SUVAL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Based on the Complaint and Judicially noticeable documents Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9C(c) and (e)(2). = (501/REQ)
